parts.text:
Run the following command and return only the output:
```
cd /Users/jaronswab/go/src/github.com/jrswab/axe && go test ./internal/mcpclient/ -run "TestCoerceArg|TestCallTool_CoercesArgTypes" -v -count=1 2>&1
```
Return the full output.
